query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of parallel diagonal ridges or slats catching light, displaying bands of gold, green, blue, and magenta across their surfaces in alternation with deep black gaps. Sharp highlights trace the angled edges, creating a rhythmic pattern of luminous colored stripes and narrow shadowed channels.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph that abandons representational clarity, showing tightly framed parallel diagonal ridges or slats catching light. Bands of gold, green, blue, and magenta wash across the surfaces in rhythmic alternation with deep black gaps, while sharp highlights trace the angled edges. The subject is unrecognizable, reduced to a composition of luminous colored stripes, refracted light, and narrow shadowed channels.
